questions.q: On April 28, 2026, SpaceX and Blue Origin informed NASA that their lunar landers will be ready for the Artemis III mission no earlier than what timeframe?
Which explicitly nonpartisan organization was highlighted in an April 28, 2026 report for being formed by former NASA astronauts to uphold the US Constitution?
In preparation for the Artemis III mission, what vessel successfully delivered the massive SLS core stage to NASA’s Kennedy Space Center as announced on April 28, 2026?
According to 3D simulations published by Kyoto University on April 28, 2026, what internal factor can cause a massive star's core to spin up rather than down before it dies?
options: The geometry of its internal magnetic field
The rate of its solar wind emission
The depletion of its hydrogen fuel
The absorption of nearby dark matter
questions.correctText: The geometry of its internal magnetic field

questions.q: As detailed in late April 2026, NASA plans to deploy a fleet of four autonomous, hopping drones by 2028 to scout the lunar south pole. What is the name of this project?
